archetype: 7 (Electric & Neon - Brutalist/Web3 style per user constraints)

headings.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl md:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-none

visual_enhancers.buttons: relative overflow-hidden bg-primary text-black font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 hover:bg-secondary transition-colors duration-300

components_instructions.name: Header
components_instructions.instructions: Sticky at top, z-50. Glassmorphism effect. Contains Logo ('P&D AGENCY'), Links (Serviços, Portfólio, Planos), and 'Contato' button that opens the Contact Modal.

components_instructions.name: Hero Section
components_instructions.instructions: Large H1 with Space Grotesk. Animated CTA button. Background should be #0e0e0e with a subtle radial gradient of #81ecff and #bc87fe in the corners.

components_instructions.name: Services Section
components_instructions.instructions: Grid of dark cards (bg-[#121212] border border-zinc-800). Use Material Symbols Outlined. Hover states should include a subtle purple or cyan glow and slight -translate-y lift.

components_instructions.name: Portfolio Bento Grid
components_instructions.instructions: Assymmetrical bento grid. Use the provided Unsplash images as object-cover backgrounds with a black/60 overlay. Text overlays on hover or fixed at the bottom.

components_instructions.name: Packages Section
components_instructions.instructions: 2-3 tier cards. CRITICAL: NO PRICES SHOWN. The CTA button in all packages must be exactly 'SOLICITAR ORÇAMENTO' and trigger the contact form modal.

components_instructions.name: Contact Form Modal
components_instructions.instructions: Use Shadcn Dialog. Must contain: Name, Email, Message, and a Select dropdown for 'Interest/Package'. Styled in dark mode.

components_instructions.name: Footer
components_instructions.instructions: Minimal dark footer. Agency branding, copyright, social links.

portfolio_item_1.description: Modern web UI mockup for bento grid

portfolio_item_2.description: Mobile app UI mockup for bento grid

portfolio_item_3.description: Abstract purple dots texture for bento grid or background accents

abstract_background.description: Neon abstract lines for secondary section backgrounds

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure global background is set strictly to #0e0e0e.
Inject the Google Fonts for Space Grotesk and Manrope.
Inject the Google Fonts Material Symbols Outlined stylesheet via CDN in index.html.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Only Space Grotesk for H1-H6, Manrope for paragraphs.
Do not render any numerical prices in the Packages section. Render 'SOLICITAR ORÇAMENTO' on all package CTAs.
Ensure Shadcn UI components (Dialog, Input, Select, Textarea) are customized to match the dark aesthetic (#121212 background, #27272a borders, focus rings using #81ecff).
Ensure mobile-first responsive design, with the grid adjusting from 1 column on mobile to up to 12 columns for the bento layout on desktop.
